# Hermes Email Skill

Hermes Email Skill is a skill package for fast delivery decisions, message QA, and launch coordination.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add hermesemailskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://hermesemailskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://hermesemailskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://hermesemailskill.com/skills/hermesemailskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://hermesemailskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Hermes Email Strategy: https://hermesemailskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Hermes Email Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://hermesemailskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Hermes Email Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://hermesemailskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
